title: CI R1 Publication Package — Tensor Extraction and Holor Phase Integrity
author: Butler, Carey Glenn
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This publication contains the formal protocol and supporting documents for the Conjugate Intelligence (CI) framework's  Resonant Tensor Transaction Protocol (RTTP) . It defines the  extraction, usage, and return  of tensors within phase-aware holor fields, ensuring semantic, torsional, and recursive coherence.
